steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is "text," a singular noun. The phrase "culled from a series of in-depth interviews" only describes that text.

steps.title: Match the singular verb
steps.content: The verb must agree with singular "text." A is only a participle, B is plural and passive, and C is plural. "Punctuates" is the singular verb that fits the sentence. The answer is D.
